name: Ascend SQLite Database Layer
description: SQLite database layer for Ascend engineering management CLI. Provides connection management, schema initialization with versioning, and health check capabilities. Manages tables for teams, members, meetings, goals, performance snapshots, coaching entries, and schedules with full-text search support.

types.name: HealthCheckResult

fields.name: ok
fields.description: True if database is healthy, False otherwise

fields.name: tables
fields.description: Mapping of table names to row counts when ok=True

types.description: Return type for check_db function - dict with status information

functions.name: get_connection
functions.description: Open a SQLite connection with WAL mode and foreign keys enabled. Sets row_factory to sqlite3.Row for dict-like access.

inputs.name: db_path
inputs.description: Path to the SQLite database file

error_cases.name: database_connection_error
error_cases.condition: sqlite3.connect() fails due to permissions, invalid path, or disk issues

preconditions: db_path is a valid Path object
side_effects: Creates database file at db_path if it does not exist

structured_side_effects.description: Creates database file if it doesn't exist
Configures connection with WAL mode and foreign keys

functions.name: init_db
functions.description: Create the database and apply the schema if needed. Creates parent directories, checks current schema version, and upgrades schema if current version is less than SCHEMA_VERSION (2). Returns an open connection.

inputs.name: db_path
inputs.description: Path to the SQLite database file to initialize

error_cases.name: directory_creation_error
error_cases.condition: mkdir() fails due to permissions or disk issues

error_cases.name: schema_query_error
error_cases.condition: Query to check current schema version fails (caught and handled by setting current=0)

error_cases.name: schema_execution_error
error_cases.condition: executescript() or execute() fails during schema creation

error_cases.name: commit_error
error_cases.condition: commit() fails due to database lock or disk issues

preconditions: db_path is a valid Path object
postconditions: All tables, triggers, and FTS5 virtual tables are created
Returns open connection with WAL mode and foreign keys enabled
side_effects: Creates parent directories for db_path if they don't exist

structured_side_effects.description: Creates or upgrades schema to version 2

functions.name: check_db
functions.description: Health check that returns database status including schema version and row counts for all tables. Returns dict with ok=False if database doesn't exist or schema not initialized.

inputs.name: db_path
inputs.description: Path to the SQLite database file to check

error_cases.name: schema_not_initialized
error_cases.condition: Query to schema_version table raises OperationalError

error_cases.name: query_execution_error
error_cases.condition: COUNT queries fail (not caught, will propagate)

preconditions: db_path is a valid Path object
postconditions: If ok=False: includes 'error' key with error message
If ok=True: includes 'version' key (int) and 'tables' key (dict mapping table names to counts)

structured_side_effects.description: Reads database to check version and table counts

invariants: WAL mode enabled for all connections
Foreign keys enabled for all connections
Row factory set to sqlite3.Row for all connections
Schema version tracked in schema_version table

data_access.rationale: Database layer that reads and writes SQLite database files on local filesystem

side_effects.rationale: Creates database files and parent directories
Queries database for version and health checks

authority.rationale: Owns SQLite schema definition and connection management for Ascend application
